name: custom-ai-provider
title: Custom AI Translator
description: Translate text with your own third-party AI providers in Raycast.
author: rokilai

preferences.name: providerName
preferences.title: Provider Name
preferences.description: Display name for your AI provider.

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL
preferences.description: Exact request URL for your provider. No path will be appended automatically.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: API key used to access your provider.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Default model name used for translation.

preferences.name: extraHeaders
preferences.title: Extra Headers
preferences.description: Optional extra headers in JSON or key:value format.

preferences.name: temperature
preferences.title: Temperature
preferences.description: Optional temperature value for the provider request.

preferences.name: requestTimeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Request Timeout
preferences.description: Optional timeout in seconds for each provider request.

commands.name: chat-with-provider
commands.title: Custom AI Translator
commands.description: Translate text with a configured third-party AI provider

commands.name: translate-selected-text
commands.title: Translate Selected Text
commands.description: Quickly translate the selected text from the frontmost app
